## Linked issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #<issue>" or "Refs #<issue>". Required except for docs-only / ci / chore PRs. -->

## Validation

- [ ] `go build ./...`, `go vet ./...`, `golangci-lint run`, `go test ./...`
- [ ] `make manifests generate` shows no diff
- [ ] Helm chart lint / unit tests pass (if charts changed)
- [ ] Relevant e2e scenario(s) run green (if applicable)
